name: SleekFlow API
description: SleekFlow is a messaging platform that enables businesses to communicate with customers across multiple channels including WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, SMS, WeChat, LINE, and web chat. The API allows you to send messages, manage contacts, and automate customer communication workflows.
